mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.username FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (user_id, post_id, content, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{postId}, #{content}, #{createTime})
